mapper.select: select date_format(accrual_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, coalesce(sum(rebate_amount), 0.00) as rebateAmount from jst_rebate_ledger where channel_id = #{channelId} and direction = 'positive' and status in ('withdrawable', 'in_review', 'paid') and del_flag = '0' and accrual_time >= #{startTime} and accrual_time < #{endTime} group by date_format(accrual_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by statDate asc
